world.title: World Cup fails to score for TV makers
world.description: India's television market experienced stagnant sales during the FIFA World Cup, defying traditional expectations of a 15-25% surge. Rising prices due to memory chip costs, inconvenient match timings, and a shift to smartphone streaming have dampened demand.
